_comment: The committed baseline. Every later milestone reruns THIS file with one
component swapped; the measured delta is that release's headline number.
JSON, not YAML: rag_blocks.core is stdlib-only and a config format must
not be the thing that drags in a dependency.
A list is a grid axis; a tuple/scalar is one value. JSON has no tuples,
so a literal-sequence parameter cannot be expressed here — use the Python
